<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Solutions\Laravel\SuggestUsingCorrectDbNameSolution as BaseSuggestUsingCorrectDbNameSolutionAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\Solution; class SuggestUsingCorrectDbNameSolution extends BaseSuggestUsingCorrectDbNameSolutionAlias implements Solution { }
